name: migrate-radix-to-base
tagline: Migrates a React/shadcn project's Radix UI primitives to Base UI, component by component, with idempotent resume logic and structured.
verdict: Thorough, deterministic migration playbook: distinct strategies per case (golden-pair CLI, legacy styles, transformation engine), resume-safe state detection, and an exact per-component report template. Minor gaps: no negative-trigger scope note, an unpinned @base-ui/react install, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: "Install @base-ui/react alongside radix" has no version pin (well-known package, unpinned).
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope note anywhere; description and body never exclude adjacent tasks or point to other skills.
No version field or changelog anywhere in frontmatter or body.
